summary: The diff modifies Header.tsx and Footer.tsx to reference new transparent-background logo filenames (loboda-logo.dim_400x400.png and loboda-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png), but the actual PNG asset files at frontend/public/assets/generated/ do not appear to have been added or replaced in the diff. The component code changes reference the new filenames with fallback logic, but the binary image assets themselves are not shown as added or modified files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the existing logo assets at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png with transparent-background versions of the same designs.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added or modified PNG files under frontend/public/assets/generated/. The actual transparent-background image assets (loboda-logo.dim_400x400.png and loboda-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png) are not present in the diff as new files. Only component code referencing these filenames was changed.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer.tsx references loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png as a secondary fallback when the primary transparent logo fails, which was not requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only mentions two logo assets (loboda-logo.png / loboda-logo.dim_400x400.png and loboda-logo-icon.png / loboda-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png). A fallback to loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png is an extra variant not mentioned anywhere in the requirements.
